prompts.name: fundo_do_mar_livre
prompts.text:
aerial drone RAW photograph, professional photography
French Polynesia, Moorea Island, Toopua Marine Nature Reserve
Sunset golden hues illuminate the surface of the deep blue sea, casting long shadows over the vibrant kelp forest that thrives on the shoreline. A cluster of coral reefs sprawls outward from the island's edge, teeming with colorful marine life. Bioluminescent fish begin to dance in the twilight, their ethereal glow creating a mesmerizing underwater ballet beneath the ocean's surface. The composition showcases the juxtaposition of the lush vegetation on land against the mysterious beauty of the deep sea below, with dramatic compositional lines leading from the shore to the distant coral reefs.
National Geographic, DJI Mavic 3 Pro, 24mm equivalent, f/8, ISO 100, ultra realistic

prompts.name: fundo_do_mar_livre_2
prompts.text:
RAW photo, professional photography.
Coral Reef: Palau's Jellyfish Lake, a unique marine lake with thousands of non-stinging jellyfish and vibrant corals illuminated by the sunlight filtering through the water.
Bioluminescent Fish: Manta Ray Bay in Yap, Micronesia, where you'll find mating Mandarinfish glowing with a soft bioluminescence.
Deep Sea: Abyssal Seamounts of the Clarion-Clipperton Zone, an underwater mountain range filled with mysterious deep sea life.
Underwater Light: The light from above is filtered through layers of water, creating a surreal, ethereal glow that highlights the vibrant colors of the marine life and the texture of the kelp forest.
Atmosphere: A sense of wonder and discovery, as if diving into another world untouched by time.
Colors: Rich blues, greens, purples, and reds from the diverse coral reef, jellyfish, and bioluminescent fish.
Composition: The foreground focuses on a group of Mandarinfish amidst the glowing kelp forest. In the background, a school of bioluminescent fish swims past a vibrant coral reef against the backdrop of the deep sea Abyssal Seamounts.
Canon EOS R5, 24mm f/11, 30s long exposure, ISO 100, ND filter, ultra realistic, National Geographic.

prompts.name: fundo_do_mar_livre_3
prompts.text:
RAW photo, professional photography:
Coral reef shimmering with iridescent life amidst a deep sea kelp forest in the Sipadan-Kapalai Marine Reserve, Malaysia. As twilight descends, bioluminescent fish dance through the underwater landscape, casting an ethereal glow upon vibrant corals and swaying fronds of kelp. The composition frames a dramatic tunnel formed by intertwining seaweed, with a lone swim-through illuminated by a single shaft of sunlight filtering through the ocean's surface above, creating a surreal balance between light and darkness.
Sony A7R V, 16-35mm f/2.8, f/8, ISO 200, ultra realistic, National Geographic.

prompts.name: submerged_shipwreck_aurora_night
prompts.text: RAW photo, professional nature photography, Abandoned Galleon entwined in bioluminescent kelp forest at twilight of the deep sea, looming thunderhead casts a dramatic shadow, intimate shot focusing on ethereal glowing scales of fish amidst coral reef, Canon EOS R5, f/4, ultra realistic, National Geographic

prompts.name: bioluminescent_under_starry_night
prompts.text: Underwater bioluminescent coral reef cave at twilight, kelp forest silhouettes against the night sky, deep-sea glow illuminating vibrant corals and shoals of glowing fish, breathtaking perspective from above, Canon EOS R5, 24-70mm f/2.8 lens, f/11, ISO 400, ultra realistic, National Geographic, fundo_do_mar category.

prompts.name: deep_sea_abyss_midday_harsh_li
prompts.text: RAW photo, professional nature photography, Dramatic underwater scene in the heart of a kelp forest, dappled with sunlight breaking through storm clouds above. The deep sea abyss shimmers with the ethereal glow of bioluminescent fish, casting an otherworldly light that illuminates the vibrant coral reef below. Captured in a silhouette shot, the scene showcases a mesmerizing balance between the chaotic power of nature and the serene beauty of the ocean depths. Canon EOS R5, 16-35mm f/2.8, f/11, ISO 100, ultra realistic, National Geographic.

prompts.name: kelp_forest_sunset_golden_h
prompts.text: RAW photo, professional nature photography, Kelp forest at sunset golden hour, with dramatic cumulonimbus casting deep sea shadows, silhouette shot of a school of bioluminescent fish dancing amidst the glowing kelp forest, Canon EOS R5, 16-35mm f/2.8, f/11, ISO 100, ultra realistic, National Geographic

prompts.name: kelp_forest_midday_harsh_li
prompts.text: RAW photo, professional nature photography: Bioluminescent fish illuminate a deep-sea kelp forest during midday, their ethereal glow contrasting against the harsh sunlight filtering through the emerald canopy above. The crystal-clear water reveals intricate details of the vibrant coral reef beneath, while tendrils of seaweed sway gently in the current. Shot with a Hasselblad X2D and 45mm f/3.5 lens at f/8, ISO 64 for ultimate clarity and ultra-realism, this panoramic vista brings the breathtaking beauty of the 'fundo_do_mar' to life, National Geographic.

prompts.name: submerged_shipwreck_midday_harsh_li
prompts.text: Underwater kelp forest, twilight hour. Bioluminescent fish illuminate a coral reef surrounding an ancient shipwreck submerged within the depths of the ocean floor. The wreckage, encrusted with marine life and shrouded in shadows, glimmers with rusted metal hinting at its past glory. A thick layer of kelp sways gently, creating a mystical atmosphere as it catches the faint glow from the luminescent creatures above. Nikon Z7 II, 24-70mm f/2.8 lens, f/16, ISO 200, ultra realistic, National Geographic.

prompts.name: nighttime_open_ocean_sunrise
prompts.text: Underwater nightscape RAW photograph, professional nature photography, Sunrise illuminates the deep sea's edge, revealing a vibrant kelp forest swaying gently in the current. The underwater canyon walls shimmer with bioluminescent coral reef and glowing fish, casting an ethereal glow across the scene. A panoramic view from below showcases the rich diversity of marine life in this unique ecosystem. Drone-captured from a low angle, DJI Mavic 3 Pro, 24mm equivalent, f/8, ISO 100, ultra realistic, National Geographic.
